1#pragma once
2
3
4#include "meta/type_id.hpp"
5#include <array>
6#include <cstddef>
7
8#include <ostream>
9#include <tuple>
10
11namespace world::meta {
12 // very meta
13 template <typename... Ts> struct type_list {
14 template <typename T> using prepend = type_list<T, Ts...>;
15
16 static constexpr size_t length = sizeof...(Ts);
17 static constexpr std::array<type_id_t, length> ids {type_id<Ts>()...};
18 using tuple = std::tuple<Ts...>;
19 };
20
21 template <typename T, typename List> struct insert_sorted;
22 template <typename T> struct insert_sorted<T, type_list<>> {using type = type_list<T>;};
23
24 // w h a t t h e f u c k
25 template <typename T, typename Head, typename... Tail>
26 struct insert_sorted<T, type_list<Head, Tail...>> {using type = std::conditional_t<(type_id<T>() < type_id<Head>()), type_list<T, Head, Tail...>, typename insert_sorted<T, type_list<Tail...>>::type::template prepend<Head>>;};
27
28 template <typename List> struct sort_types;
29 template <> struct sort_types<type_list<>> {using type = type_list<>;};
30 template <typename Head, typename... Tail>struct sort_types<type_list<Head, Tail...>> {using type = typename insert_sorted<Head, typename sort_types<type_list<Tail...>>::type>::type;};
31
32 // Add / remove components. TODO: check for duplicates.
33 template<typename List, typename T> using add_t = typename sort_types<typename List::template prepend<T>>::type;
34 template<typename T, typename List>
35 struct remove;
36
37 template<typename T>
38 struct remove<T, type_list<>> {
39 using type = type_list<>;
40 };
41
42 template<typename T, typename Head, typename... Tail>
43 struct remove<T, type_list<Head, Tail...>> {
44 using rest = typename remove<T, type_list<Tail...>>::type;
45
46 using type = std::conditional_t<
47 std::is_same_v<T, Head>,
48 rest,
49 typename rest::template prepend<Head>
50 >;
51 };
52
53 template<typename List, typename T>
54 using remove_t = typename sort_types<typename remove<T, List>::type>::type;
55
56 template <typename T, typename List>
57 struct index_of;
58
59 template <typename T, typename... Ts>
60 struct index_of<T, type_list<T, Ts...>>
61 : std::integral_constant<std::size_t, 0> {};
62
63 template <typename T, typename Head, typename... Tail>
64 struct index_of<T, type_list<Head, Tail...>>
65 : std::integral_constant<std::size_t, 1 + index_of<T, type_list<Tail...>>::value> {};
66
67 template <typename List> struct for_each_type_indexed;
68
69 template <typename... Ts> struct for_each_type_indexed<type_list<Ts...>> {
70 template <typename F> static constexpr void apply(F &&f) {
71 apply_impl(std::forward<F>(f), std::index_sequence_for<Ts...>{});
72 }
73
74 private:
75 template <typename F, size_t... Is>
76 static constexpr void apply_impl(F &&f, std::index_sequence<Is...>) {
77 (f.template operator()<Ts, Is>(), ...);
78 }
79 };
80
81 template <typename Decl, typename Canon>
82 struct permutation;
83
84 template <typename... Ds, typename... Cs>
85 struct permutation<type_list<Ds...>, type_list<Cs...>> {
86 static constexpr std::array<std::size_t, sizeof...(Cs)> value = {
87 index_of<Cs, type_list<Ds...>>::value...
88 };
89 };
90
91 template <typename DeclList, typename CanonTuple>
92 constexpr auto permute_from_canonical(CanonTuple&& canon) {
93 using CanonList = typename sort_types<DeclList>::type;
94 constexpr auto& perm = permutation<DeclList, CanonList>::value;
95
96 return [&]<std::size_t... Is>(std::index_sequence<Is...>) {
97 return typename DeclList::tuple{
98 std::get<perm[Is]>(std::forward<CanonTuple>(canon))...
99 };
100 }(std::make_index_sequence<DeclList::length>{});
101 }
102
103 template <typename Decl, typename Canon>
104 struct decl_to_canon;
105
106 template <typename... Ds, typename Cs>
107 struct decl_to_canon<type_list<Ds...>, Cs> {
108 static constexpr std::array<std::size_t, sizeof...(Ds)> value = {
109 index_of<Ds, Cs>::value...
110 };
111 };
112
113}
114
115// Formatter overrides
116
117#ifndef NDEBUG
118template <std::size_t N>
119struct std::formatter<std::array<world::meta::type_id_t, N>, char> {
120 constexpr auto parse(std::format_parse_context& ctx) {
121 return ctx.begin();
122 }
123
124 template <typename FormatContext>
125 auto format(const std::array<world::meta::type_id_t, N>& arr,
126 FormatContext& ctx) const {
127 auto out = ctx.out();
128 *out++ = '[';
129 for (std::size_t i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
130 out = std::format_to(out, "{}", arr[i]);
131 if (i + 1 < N) out = std::format_to(out, ", ");
132 }
133 *out++ = ']';
134 return out;
135 }
136};
137
138template <>
139struct std::formatter<std::span<const world::meta::type_id_t>, char> {
140 constexpr auto parse(std::format_parse_context& ctx) {
141 return ctx.begin();
142 }
143
144 template <typename FormatContext>
145 auto format(std::span<const world::meta::type_id_t> s,
146 FormatContext& ctx) const {
147 auto out = ctx.out();
148 *out++ = '[';
149 for (std::size_t i = 0; i < s.size(); ++i) {
150 out = std::format_to(out, "{}", s[i]);
151 if (i + 1 < s.size()) out = std::format_to(out, ", ");
152 }
153 *out++ = ']';
154 return out;
155 }
156};
157
158#endif
